description: Use this API to read a power flow raw data file and add all the data specified in it to the working case. Allowed raw file formats are PSSE-15 through current format. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = readrawversion(numnam, vernum, ifile)

parameters.name: numnam
parameters.description: Flag for bus number or name specification on records. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: vernum
parameters.description: Version number corresponding to the format of ifile. vernum is in the format of a psse release number. example: if ifile format is of psse-29.5.1: vernum = ‘29’ or = ‘29.5’ or = ‘29.5.1’. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ifile
parameters.description: Name of power flow raw data file. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
